news.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
news.summary: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.

news.title: FBI announces takedown of phishing operation that targeted thousands of victims
news.summary: Cybercriminals allegedly used the W3LL phishing kit to target more than 17,000 victims worldwide, stealing their passwords and multi-factor authentication codes.
